items.name: Quilt
items.description: Visual desktop studio for data work: ETL/ELT plus statistics, ML, and deep learning on one canvas. Drag a pipeline, pull from 350+ connectors, reshape with 136 transforms, train ML/ONNX models and chart inline, then land data anywhere at native DuckDB speed. Built-in AI assistant (OpenAI-compatible). Rust + Tauri + React.

items.name: freqtrade-ultimate
items.description: Production-grade Freqtrade fork for algorithmic trading on Hyperliquid. Multi-bot OHLCV/pairlist caching, PlateauSampler hyperopt, walk-forward with CPCV, custom hyperopt losses, liquidation detection, 32+ enhancements. Includes showcase strategies. Maintained by Freqtrade France.

items.name: opensearch-proxy
items.description: High-performance, low-latency OpenSearch routing proxy (Rust). Partition-based multi-tenant placement (dedicated/shared cluster & index), pluggable SPI, HTTP/1.1/2 + gRPC, optional FIPS, and LLM-debuggable observability.

items.name: deep-learning-wafer-defects

items.name: Register-Broker
items.description: Universal low-level hardware access framework for Windows. One narrow, signed kernel driver plus an authenticated LocalSystem broker give non-admin apps secure, audited access to PC sensors and RGB hardware — clients name logical ids (smu.cpu.temp, ram0), never addresses, and can't scan or write outside a baked, kernel-enforced map.

items.name: AK-SCOPE
items.description: AK-SCOPE is a custom-built, fully open-source Autoguided Dobsonian Telescope. It combines 3D-printed mechanics, dual Arduino microcontrollers, and a Python-based interface to automatically aim and track celestial objects using spherical trigonometry
